entries.title: H4bbo Flash Archive Index
entries.notes: Strong source for later emulator packs, packet docs, and RELEASE63-related assets. Requires per-file curation.
entries.legalNotes: Do not treat all hosted files as redistributable.
signals: multiple emulator families for behavior cross-checking

entries.title: Holo HabboStuff Archive Index
entries.notes: Useful for historical breadth, but very noisy. Must aggressively reject hacks and low-trust executables.
entries.legalNotes: High provenance uncertainty on many files.

entries.title: Snowlight
entries.notes: Useful for subsystem decomposition and packet/domain breadth, not for runtime architecture reuse.
signals: legacy runtime pain points to avoid
